problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
